atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right ankle pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a fall last night

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports hearing a pop during the fall

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports inability to walk immediately after the fall

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tolerating a small amount of weight-bearing

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports limping

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports constant and throbbing pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as exacerbated by touch

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies numbness or tingling

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient previously played soccer in high school

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals ecchymosis over the lateral malleolus

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals swelling of the ankle

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation elicits tenderness in the anterior and lateral soft tissue

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Dorsalis pedis pulse is strong

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes an air cast for ankle support.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes ibuprofen as needed for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to schedule a follow-up appointment in two to three weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to consider an MRI if symptoms persist or worsen.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to avoid weight-bearing on the affected leg for one to two days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to keep the leg elevated.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to ice the leg five times a day for 20 minutes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans to provide crutches for assistance with ambulation.
